CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-17-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Daniel Martinez, Esq. appeared with petitioner Nadiyah Rasheed, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Davidion Lawrence, who was also present at today's hearing.
Guardian and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $50,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $12,500.00.
Medical Expenses - $1,798.20.
Costs - $1,263.46.

The net balance of $34,438.34 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 555 California Street, San Francisco, CA 94108. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
